headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Expands Daikyo Ties As Valuation Questions Grow
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) is back in focus after signing two long term distributorship agreements with Daikyo Seiko, expanding its role as exclusive distributor of Daikyo products outside Japan. See our latest analysis for West Pharmaceutical Services. Alongside the Daikyo agreements, West Pharmaceutical Services has been in focus ahead of its upcoming July 23 earnings release, with the stock showing a 30 day share price return of 8.32% and a 1 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Fractyl Health Stock Up on Encouraging One-Year Revita Study Results
summary: GUTS' shares surge after Revita patients retain up to 84% of GLP-1-induced weight loss in a year, compared with 46% for sham patients.
